flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 39% at York College of Pennsylvania vs the 2003–2007 baseline (3.2k vs 5.2k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at York College of Pennsylvania rose 30% between 2006 and 2009 ($11.2k → $14.5k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at York College of Pennsylvania rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($22.4k → $25.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at York College of Pennsylvania fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.2% → 0.0%).
